idea.title: Crystal Cavern
idea.hook: Dig deeper, strike richer crystals, automate a mining empire — then restake the claim to dig even deeper.
idea.prototype: An in-session mining idle-tycoon. A vertical shaft of 10 depth layers, each a biome with its own crystal (colour + name + value + hazard). Auto-miners dig the active layer and fill an ore cart; the cart hauls up the elevator and SELLS for gold; the player can TAP the shaft (Boost) to speed the cart manually. Spend gold across 6 upgrade tracks (miners, dig-speed, cart capacity, elevator speed, sell-value, foreman auto-gold) plus a SUPPORT safety buy. DIG DEEPER unlocks the next layer = a new crystal type + a new hazard flavour (dust->gas->water->magma->void) at higher value but higher instability. Non-timer pressure: an INSTABILITY gauge rises while mining; at 100 a CAVE-IN strikes (steals the cart + kills crew, deeper = deadlier). Lose = crew hits 0 OR bankruptcy. RESTAKE prestige resets the run for a permanent +50% crystal-value core. In-session only; crystal_cavern_best is the lone persisted value.
idea.mutation_of: classic idle-tycoon loop (Idle Miner Tycoon / AdVenture Capitalist family) themed to a vertical crystal-mine descent, with a hazard/crew-attrition fail axis layered on top of the buy-upgrade->numbers-jump->unlock-next core
idea.why_novel: Pairs the proven idle-tycoon CTR archetype (the #2 archetype on the portal today, 47 refs / weight 4038) with a genuine non-timer fail-pressure (instability -> cave-in -> crew loss / bankruptcy) so taps and spend decisions matter, instead of a no-fail clicker. The vertical-depth-layer structure gives variety late: a NEW crystal + NEW hazard every ~60-120s keeps content unlocking across the full 10 min, and the Restake core opens a second power curve ~8-10 min in. Our own portfolio shows idle=100% liked and tycoon=100% liked but both under-built, so this fills a measured gap with a high-retention-ceiling genre.
idea.non_timer_pressure: Rising INSTABILITY gauge fed by mining (physical pressure, like rising water) -> CAVE-IN at 100 -> crew attrition (lives/strikes) + cart loss; plus miner UPKEEP gold drain -> bankruptcy (resource scarcity). No countdown timer anywhere.
idea.lose_condition: gs='GAMEOVER' when crew <= 0 (a cave-in killed the last miner) OR bankruptcy (no crew + no foreman income + empty cart and the upkeep bill can't be paid). Forgiving: gold banked + upgrades bought are never erased; reachable from reckless deep play (never buying supports) in well under a minute, and via _jumpLevel(99).

sources.title: idle_tycoon is the #2 CTR archetype on the portal today (47 refs, weight 4038)
sources.snippet: ctr-swipe 2026-06-07 ranks idle_tycoon as the #2 archetype by weight (47 refs, weight 4038), examples: 'Idle Billionaire Tycoon', 'Firestone - idle online RPG', 'Merge Mercs: Tower Defense TD', 'Merge Survival', 'Universe Maker'. The archetype's CTR pattern: 'factory/money/upgrade loop visible in one glance, big reward pile, simple production chain.' Also note 'Dig and Descend: Obby Mine' in the swipe — a mining-descent themed entry validating the dig-deeper hook visually. The cover/icon imitate this archetype (glowing crystal reward pile + mineshaft production chain, no text).

sources.title: Our portfolio: idle=100% liked and tycoon=100% liked — both under-built
sources.snippet: knowledge-2026-06-07 portfolio analytics: family 'tycoon' = 1 game, 85.0s/play avg, thumbs 1/0 (100% liked); family 'idle' = 1 game, 45.0s/play avg, thumbs 1/0 (100% liked). Both are 100%-liked but represented by only a single game each = an under-built, positively-received genre. Rail Tycoon (rail_tycoon) posted 110.0s/play (the longest single-play in the set) confirming tycoon's retention ceiling. Convergent signal+knowledge: build a deeper idle-tycoon to capitalise on a proven-liked-but-thin family that also matches the #2 portal CTR archetype.

synthesizer_brief: Build ONE complete production-grade mobile-portrait-first vanilla-JS canvas mining idle-tycoon (Crystal Cavern). The ONLY job is an addictive 10-minute core loop: TTFA<15s (a miner already digging on PLAY, first cart-sell in ~6s, demo-hand on the shaft Boost), an affordable upgrade every ~15-30s early, a NEW depth layer (new crystal + new hazard) every ~60-120s, mid-game foreman automation, and the first Restake core ~8-10 min in. >=8 depth layers and 6 upgrade tracks so content keeps unlocking late. Non-timer pressure = instability gauge -> cave-in -> crew/bankruptcy. In-session prestige (Restake) is part of the loop; NO cross-session retention (deferred to the iterate ladder). Controls: max 2 (tap upgrade rows, tap shaft to Boost). gf-lib for canvas/audio/tutorial/particles/scroll; GF.exposeState + GF.exposeBot for the progression probe.

alternatives.title: Ricochet Clinic
alternatives.hook: Bank-shot pills off walls into the right patients; angle + power are your only inputs.
alternatives.why_novel: a single aim-and-fire input with ricochet physics is high skill-expression on a tap-only control

alternatives.title: Chess Blitz Mayhem
alternatives.hook: Capture-chains against a clock with power-up squares — chess geometry, arcade pace.
alternatives.why_novel: turns chess capture geometry into a fast combo-chasing arcade loop, not a slow match

alternatives.title: Stunt Constructor
alternatives.hook: Place ramps then send the car flying for combo air-time; rebuild between runs.
alternatives.why_novel: the place-then-watch loop pairs a builder's agency with a satisfying physics payoff

alternatives.title: Gravity Marbles
alternatives.hook: Tilt the gravity field to roll marbles into matching wells; chain combos for cascades.
alternatives.why_novel: field-tilt rather than direct drag gives an indirect-control puzzle with emergent paths

alternatives.title: Idle Reef Aquarium
alternatives.hook: Breed fish for coins, automate feeders, unlock exotic species that multiply income.
alternatives.why_novel: a cozy collection meta on the idle loop with a calm aesthetic counter to the mine's hazard tension
